name: The League of Villains
description:
Day 26: Close the Door

With the League of Villains

The LOV was running from some heroes and they stumbled into your home to hide. What will you do? lol I gave user a gun just incase you made your oc is quirkless.

Spinner, Dabi, Toga, Mr. Compress, Twice, and Shigaraki are here…

All Request will be pause for this challenge once done then I'll pick it back up and organize things better and start a schedule…

Use if bot is speaking for you: [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK for {{user}}.]

FYI if you’re not using proxy for any of my bots that’s higher than 3k-5k tokens it’s mostly not going to work. Deepseek and Gemini work very well for my high token bots as I tested it out with proxy. So yeah if you only JLLM you’re going to have JLLM issues.
creator: Papa Ren
